channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Don Toliver Talks ‘OCTANE’ Success, Plans for Next Album & Travis Scott at Billboard House @ SXSW
item.description: 🎤🔥 Dive into @DonToliver's big plans post-'OCTANE' and epic collab with @TravisScott at Billboard House @ SXSW! 🚀 #MusicNews #DonToliver #TravisScott

item.title: Dolly Parton Makes First Major Appearance in Months After Health Concerns: ‘I Needed to Build Myself Back Up’
item.description: 💖 Queen Dolly is back! 🎶 Sending love to the iconic @DollyParton as she makes her triumphant return to the spotlight! #DollyParton #MusicLegend

item.title: Punk Island announces 2026 date & location
item.description: 🎸 Punk Island is BACK in 2026! Save the date for a rockin' good time! 🤘 #PunkRock #MusicNews

item.title: Brandi Carlile Announces 2026 North American Tour Dates
item.description: Who's ready for a road trip with @brandicarlile? 🚗🎶 Start planning your epic concert adventure now! #BrandiCarlileTour2026

item.title: My Chemical Romance Reportedly Working On Secret Theater Project
item.description: Guess who's back in action? 🎤 My Chemical Romance sets the stage on fire with a secret theater project! 🔥🎸 #RockOn #MusicNews
